title: Pentagon: Iran war cost rises to $29 billion — up from $25B two weeks ago; Harvard expert projects $1T
snippet: Pentagon estimates war cost $29B, up from $25B two weeks prior. Increase reflects updated repair/replacement costs plus general operational costs. Includes munitions, aircraft damage, O&M, other expenses tied to Operation Epic Fury. Harvard Kennedy School expert Linda Bilmes projects true cost at $1 trillion.
tag_reason: Updated war cost figure disclosed 5/12, not previously reported
